overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from Red Dead Redemption 2 showing a foggy morning walk through the Port of Saint Denis docks. The player moves from a ship deck through wooden piers, past historic harbor buildings, and into an industrial cargo area with workers and shipping materials.

events.description: panning left reveals ship smokestack and deck structures previously out of view

agents.ego_description: standing on a ship deck, looking out at the foggy harbor and panning to view the vessel's rigging

entered.detail: network of ropes and lines from the ship's masts hanging overhead
tall black smokestack with red top belonging to the steamship
obscured view of distant ships and harbor structures through heavy fog
wooden railing along the edge of the ship deck

segments.scene_description: Standing on the deck of a tall ship enveloped in fog, surrounded by overhead rigging and ropes. The camera slowly pans left to reveal the ship's smokestack and deck structures while distant vessels loom as shadows in the mist.

scene_state.functional_zone: wooden pier with industrial crane structure

events.description: moving from ship deck onto the wooden dock platform
passing under large metal gantry crane structure with hanging cables

agents.ego_description: walking off the ship onto the wooden dock, passing beneath the large metal framework

entered.detail: large industrial steel framework spanning the dock with hanging pulleys and cables
weathered wooden planks of the dock walkway
small wooden structures and sheds along the dock edge

segments.scene_description: Moving from the ship onto the expansive wooden dock, passing beneath a massive industrial gantry crane. The fog continues to obscure the harbor as the camera advances along the pier toward the distant dock buildings.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered boardwalk promenade with port authority building

events.description: entering the main boardwalk area with covered pavilion walkway
passing by pedestrians and benches along the boardwalk railing

agents.ego_description: walking along the wooden boardwalk past ornate lamp posts and benches, approaching the Port of Saint Denis building

notable_agents.action: man in suspenders standing near the railing looking out at the water
man in white shirt and suspenders walking toward the camera

entered.detail: large two-story brick building with white trim and painted signage reading Port of Saint Denis
ornate covered walkway with decorative wooden trim and support columns
black ornate Victorian-style lamp posts along the boardwalk
empty wooden slatted benches facing the water
red, white, and blue fabric banners strung across the boardwalk

segments.scene_description: Walking along the main boardwalk promenade lined with ornate lamp posts and empty benches. The large Port of Saint Denis building dominates the view ahead, while patriotic bunting hangs overhead and a few pedestrians stroll through the foggy atmosphere.

scene_state.functional_zone: waterfront dock with moored sailing vessels

events.description: turning to walk along the waterfront edge, revealing moored sailing ships
tall-masted sailing ships become visible through the fog in the water

agents.ego_description: turning to walk along the water's edge, passing the railroad company office and viewing the moored vessels

notable_agents.action: worker leaning against the building wall with arms crossed
man walking away from camera toward the warehouse area

entered.detail: green wooden building with arched windows and painted signage for Lemoyne Eastern Railroad Company
tall ships with masts docked in the foggy water
large industrial warehouse building with Lemoyne Mills painted on the roof
American flag on pole waving in the breeze

segments.scene_description: Continuing along the dock past the green Lemoyne Eastern Railroad Company building. The camera turns to reveal tall-masted sailing ships moored in the foggy water, with the large Lemoyne Mills warehouse visible in the distance.

scene_state.functional_zone: industrial cargo loading area with warehouses

events.description: entering the industrial cargo zone with stacked sacks and barrels
navigating between stacks of cargo and workers loading materials

agents.ego_description: walking through the industrial cargo area, passing workers and stacks of barrels and sacks near the warehouse

notable_agents.action: worker pushing a wooden hand cart loaded with sacks
two workers conversing near stacks of cargo

entered.detail: stacks of burlap sacks piled on the wooden dock
groups of wooden barrels stacked near the warehouse
wooden hand cart with metal frame for moving cargo
tall factory smokestacks emitting smoke in the background

segments.scene_description: Moving into the industrial heart of the docks, passing close to the Lemoyne Mills warehouse. Workers handle cargo among stacks of sacks and wooden barrels, while industrial smokestacks rise in the foggy background.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person journey from the secluded deck of a ship into the bustling industrial heart of the Saint Denis docks. It begins amidst the rigging and ropes of a tall ship enveloped in fog, panning left to reveal a smokestack and the ghostly silhouettes of distant vessels. As the camera moves onto the expansive wooden pier, it passes beneath a massive industrial gantry crane before advancing toward the harbor's architecture. The scene then opens onto a boardwalk promenade lined with ornate lamp posts and patriotic bunting, leading past the green Lemoyne Eastern Railroad Company building toward moored sailing ships. Finally, the path shifts into a dense cargo area where the camera glides past the Lemoyne Mills warehouse and workers handling sacks and barrels beneath towering industrial smokestacks.
